dataList.name: Limbus Company Specialized Custom Prosthetic Prototype mk5 - Dokkaebi Arms
dataList.desc:
Encounter Start: Gain [AengduNewArm]

If there is an ally at less than 50% HP on the field excluding this unit, gain 1 [SupportProtect] (once per turn)
dataList.flavor:
"On the outside, it looks no different from prostheses you might find in other Nests or Backstreets... But apparently, this particular prosthetic limb has been created using technology unique to Limbus Company. I wonder what that could be..."

"Since the development of this prototype was led by the LCD Department, I would assume it has something to do with the power of Distortions... Oh, that's not to say that I have any certainty regarding the matter—I was only in charge of transporting it, you see. It's just a simple speculation, really. In any case, I doubt this is your average prosthetic limb meant for body enhancement."

dataList.name: Demonfire Spinecleaver
dataList.desc:
Skill End: Gain 1 [WindBlade] for every 3 [Breath] (max 5, 2 times per turn)

On Base Attack Skill End: At 15+ [WindBlade], activate "Even the Balance - Lucent Rippling Flame" on the enemy (once per turn)

On Defense Skill Clash Lose, if this unit has 3+ [Agility], this unit cannot be Staggered from taking damage until Defense Skill End, and activate "To Claim Their Bones" against the enemy after being hit (2 times per turn, excluding forced Staggers)
dataList.summary: Activate additional Skill when conditions are met

dataList.name: Swiftblade
dataList.desc: On Crit, gain 1 [Agility] next turn (3 times per Skill, 2 times per turn)

dataList.name: To Where I Must Return
dataList.desc:
When 3 or more other Blade Lineage allies are defeated:
- When gaining [Breath] Potency/Count using this unit's own Skills and Coin effects: Gain 1 more of each
- When 5 or more other Blade Lineage allies are defeated, gain 2 more of each instead
- Combat Start: Apply [SwordPlayOfTheHomeland] on self

dataList.name: Fugitive
dataList.desc: Upon entering the Encounter for the first time, gain [BrandedKimSatgat]

dataList.name: Bearing of a Salsu
dataList.desc:
At 1 [Breath] Count, lose 10 HP instead of losing [Breath] Count (this effect cannot Stagger this unit and does not drop this unit's HP below 1)

Deal +(missing HP percentage on self / 2) damage on Critical Hit using Base Skills (max 50%)

dataList.name: Swordplay of the Homeland
dataList.desc:
Combat Start: If Pride Reson. was activated,
- Gain (Pride Reson. x 2) [Breath] (max 8)
- Apply 1 [SlashResultUp] and 1 [CriticalDamageUp] on all Sinners and Assist Units excluding this unit (for Blade Lineage targets, double this effect)

Turn End: Gain ([Breath] on self / 4) [Agility] next turn (max 6, rounded down)

dataList.name: Blade Lineage Mentor
dataList.desc:
When gaining [Breath] Potency/Count using this unit's own Skills and Coin effects: Apply 1 [Breath] Potency and 1 [Breath] Count on the Sinner and 2 Assist Units that do not have [Breath] or have the lowest [Breath] Potency (excluding this unit)
- For Blade Lineage allies, apply 3 [Breath] Potency and +2 [Breath] Count instead

When a Blade Lineage Sinner or Assist Unit is defeated, this unit loses 10 SP

dataList.name: Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones
dataList.desc:
In this Encounter, when this unit takes damage that brings its HP down to 0, nullify that damage; then, this unit's HP cannot drop below 1 for the turn (once per Encounter)

Turn End: At 30+ [Breath] Potency, fix this unit's Speed to 20 next turn and equip "Yield My Flesh" on the leftmost Skill Slot
- If "Yield My Flesh" becomes inaccessible due to Skill effect, this effect does not activate

dataList.name: Fate Lost
dataList.desc: Lose this Encounter if this unit is killed
dataList.flavor: One may get lost and wander onto the wrong path, but willful defiance or deviation from the flow are forbidden by "it."

dataList.name: Dimensional Bag [Ezra]
dataList.desc:
Encounter Start: Gain 1 [DimensionalBagEzraA]

If this unit used the current Workshop weapon more than once, switch weapons the next turn

List of weapons:
- Allas Workshop Gloves
- Nester Workshop Hammer
- Screw Atelier Drill Hammer
- Namir Workshop Gauntlets
- YuRia Atelier Axe
